raw_consumer_statement:
This complaint is a continuation of my previous CFPB complaints XXXX and XXXX, which were closed pending a police report. I now have the police report number : XXXX. 

A fraudulent charge totaling {$26000.00} was made on my American Express account. I did not authorize this charge, did not receive any merchandise, and this activity constitutes financial coercion and theft by false pretenses, as documented in my police report. 

Out of fear and pressure, I made payments toward this fraudulent charge, but I do not owe this debt and should not be held responsible. Additionally, this fraudulent activity has negatively impacted my credit score. 

I have previously notified AMEX, requested verification of the charge, and asked for removal. AMEX has not resolved the issue, removed the charge, or provided proper confirmation of any actions taken.
